Select the attachment fields to download: Select the attachment fields to download
选择要批量下载的附件字段，留空则下载所有附件字段: Select the attachment fields to download, leave empty to download all attachment fields
选择一个或多个字段作为文件夹名称，留空则使用记录ID: Select one or more fields as the folder name, leave empty to use record ID
选择分组字段后，附件将按该字段值分组存储在不同文件夹中: When a grouping field is selected, attachments will be grouped by the field value into different folders
请先选择要下载的记录: Please select records to download first
